name: Chicken Rice Burritos
recipeIngredient: 1 package Uncle Ben's Brand Chicken Flavor Rice Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sour cream, milk, and green chilies in a bowl. Chill to blend flavors.
2. Cook rice according to package directions, adding cayenne pepper.
3. Stir in diced chicken and salt. Heat through. Cover and keep warm (150-160°F) until ready to serve.
4. Place a scoop of chicken-rice mixture on each tortilla. Fold the tortillas. Ladle 1/2 ounce sour cream sauce over top of folded tortillas.
PORTIONS: Approximately 60 servings
